extra.reason: Upgraded recharts 2.15.4 -> 3.9.2. Re-synced shadcn ui/chart.tsx via CLI for recharts-3 types; added CartesianGrid yAxisId=left fix in ComposedChart. Verified: typecheck, build, lint, and visual browser check (both charts + tooltip render, no console errors).

Turborepo added: root turbo.json (ui:tui, envMode:strict, dev/preview) + apps/extensions/turbo.json extends // with build outputs+WEB_APP_URL env; root scripts delegate to turbo run; .turbo gitignored. Verified: cold build + FULL TURBO cache hit, strict-mode env passthrough, typecheck green.
Done: pnpm workspace + Turborepo skeleton shipped (root turbo.json with ui:tui/envMode:strict, apps/extensions/turbo.json extends //, turbo dep, root scripts delegate to turbo run). Merged in PR #15.
Done: app already relocated to apps/extensions (@tartinerlabs/extensions), behavior-identical build. Layout uses apps/extensions rather than the originally-planned apps/app, but the move is complete.
Dropped per refined plan (.claude/plans/looking-to-build-a-jiggly-cat.md sec 4/7): no shared @repo/tsconfig package; each future package carries a minimal inline tsconfig.json instead.
Dropped per refined plan (sec 5): no shared @repo/styles package; each app owns its own CSS/Tailwind pipeline. apps/extensions keeps src/globals.css as-is.

Done: .releaserc already targets apps/extensions/package.json (assets) + pnpm -r version prepareCmd; CI release.yml builds/typechecks via turbo (pnpm build/typecheck delegate to turbo run). No CI job globs the old root dist.
Moved existing AGENTS import to line 1 and verified move-only diff.
Implemented web push functions, browser controls, tests, and deployment handoff
Implemented the selected hybrid marketing page, verified production behavior at desktop and mobile widths, and passed design QA.
Implemented and verified bundled extension dashboard navigation for More Details; no hosted deployment required.
